name: TN Brain · 2 · Reconciliation (07:00 Mon-Fri — refresh active accounts only)

parameters.jsonBody: {"query":"query { boards(ids:[1126338886]){ items_page(limit:200){ items { id name group{ title } column_values(ids:[\"date\",\"date6\",\"sow_status\",\"status\"]){ id text } subitems { column_values(ids:[\"numbers\"]){ id text } } } } } }"}
{"query":"query { boards(ids:[1692810780]){ items_page(limit:200){ items { group{ title } column_values(ids:[\"dropdown8__1\",\"people__1\"]){ id text } } } } }"}
{"query":"query { boards(ids:[1118885420]){ items_page(limit:200){ items { id name column_values(ids:[\"role8\",\"team\",\"client_name6\",\"status0\"]){ id text } } } } }"}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO run_logs (workflow,status,detail) VALUES ('reconcile','ok', jsonb_build_object('accounts', {{ $('Build reconcile SQL').first().json.accounts }}, 'projects', {{ $('Build reconcile SQL').first().json.projects }}, 'associates', {{ $('Build reconcile SQL').first().json.associates }}, 'statements', {{ $('Build reconcile SQL').first().json.statements }}));

parameters.content:
## Reconciliation — refresh ACTIVE accounts only
07:00 weekdays. Reads the accounts already in the brain, then updates **only those** from Monday (SOW numbers/status/dates, pod, DM, consultants) — and **only where something changed**. Stamps `last_verified`.

Dormant accounts are left alone. A NEW account is created on demand by the Main Pipeline when its first call arrives (read-through cache).

Fail-safe: empty Monday response = no changes.
